## Summary

Describe the focused change and its industrial use case.

## Compatibility checklist

- [ ] TCP port 5005 remains compatible.
- [ ] Valid JSON still receives `{"status":"OK"}` promptly.
- [ ] Only MicroPython-compatible runtime modules are used.
- [ ] Queues and buffers are bounded.
- [ ] No credentials, certificates, identifiers, or private logs are included.

## Verification

List hardware, firmware, duration, message rate, ACK result, latency, free
memory range, MQTT result, and restart count.
